'''DD-19''' was a [[Gender/Legends|masculine]] [[DD-19 "Overseer" labor pool droid]] assigned to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''. It was nicknamed "the slavemaster" due to its harsh treatment of other [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. DD-19 was primarily assigned to the droid repair bay on the ship, and had the authority to apply [[Restraining bolt/Legends|restraining bolts]] to unruly droids.

{{Droid-stub}}
